title: Application Support Analyst
description:
about the company

A prominent global financial services institution committed to digital innovation and operational excellence. The organization fosters a dynamic and collaborative culture, focusing on mission-critical banking systems and robust risk management frameworks.

about the job

Join a specialized service recovery team as a technical specialist focused on enhancing the stability and reliability of enterprise-level risk systems.

  • Provide proactive technical support and incident management for specialized risk platforms to ensure seamless business operations.

  • Execute standardized change control procedures and manage application releases following strict financial industry guidelines.

  • Collaborate with engineering teams to investigate technical issues, analyze impacts, and validate fixes for production environments.

  • Lead disaster recovery and business continuity exercises while overseeing infrastructure-related upgrades.

  • Act as a strategic liaison between business users and technical teams, providing detailed root-cause analysis and regular status updates.

skills and experience required

  • At least 5 years of application support experience within a financial institution or banking environment.

  • Deep competency in risk domains, including enterprise, credit, or operational risk frameworks.

  • Technical proficiency with tier-1 data analytics software, database management systems, and enterprise scheduling tools.

  • Hands-on experience in a high-pressure production support role, including shift-based rotations and ITIL-driven environments.

  • Proven ability to document standard operating procedures and identify potential production risks to drive continuous improvement.

Please click on the 'apply' button to apply online. For more information, please reach out to Amrita Chandran. (EA: 94C3609 / R1440037)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED
